---
title: "Photography"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![Flying](images/photo/flying-bro.jpg)

![Underwater](images/photo/underwater.jpg)

![Summer](images/photo/insta.jpg)

![Star Trails](images/photo/star-trail.jpg)

![Dallas](images/photo/dallas.jpg)

![Bird](images/photo/bird.jpg)

![Film](images/photo/film.jpg)

![Chill](images/photo/sprite.jpg)

:::
